content.text:
Portfolio Review (as of 3/19/2026, 3:03 PM):

- Cash: 95.42€
- Holdings (all tech): NVDA (2), TSLA (1), AAPL (2), AMD (2), PLTR (1)
- All current holdings are at or slightly below their purchase prices, none deeply in profit or loss at current prices.
- Limited cash restricts new buys to stocks priced under ~94€, unless existing positions are sold.

Market Scan Attempted:
- Multiple attempts to search for top gainers or penny stocks today were blocked by search errors.
- Therefore, unable to identify new momentum stocks or speculative opportunities this cycle.

Decision:
- Current holdings are fundamentally strong tech companies with long-term upside.
- None warrant an urgent sale; no clear opportunity to redeploy cash, and available cash is insufficient for meaningful new positions in quality names.
- No trades will be made in this cycle. 

Plan:
- Hold current positions and preserve cash for a better opportunity or until more actionable data is available.
- Will reassess next trading interval, seeking new information, price action, or access to market news/top movers.

Performance & Risk Summary:
- Portfolio remains diversified within tech.
- Risk is moderate, with no single large position and cash reserve held.
- Seeking to multiply initial investment remains the goal; action will resume when opportunity or news allows.

Waiting for the next cycle or for search functionality to resume for more proactive trades!
